summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Legal and Disclaimer Module. All 8 features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Footer appears globally on all protected pages, legal pages render correctly, and click-wrap agreement on professional registration works as expected.
passed_tests: Footer appears on Dashboard page with Legal Disclaimer and Terms of Use links
Footer appears on MatchMaker Landing page with legal links
Footer appears on MatchMaker Search page with legal links
Footer appears on Professional Register page with legal links
Footer appears on Legal Disclaimer page with legal links
Footer appears on Terms of Use page with legal links
Footer Legal Disclaimer link navigates to /legal-disclaimer correctly
Footer Terms of Use link navigates to /terms-of-use correctly
Dashboard has legal links section with Legal Disclaimer and Terms of Use links
Dashboard Legal Disclaimer link navigates correctly
Dashboard Terms of Use link navigates correctly
Legal Disclaimer page (/legal-disclaimer) renders with all 5 sections
Terms of Use page (/terms-of-use) renders with all 5 sections
Login page does NOT have footer (as expected for non-protected page)
Professional Registration Step 3 has click-wrap agreement checkbox
Terms checkbox (data-testid='terms-checkbox') is present and functional
Terms of Use link in click-wrap opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Legal Disclaimer link in click-wrap opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Create Profile button is disabled when terms_accepted is false
Create Profile button becomes enabled after accepting terms
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-legal-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal and Disclaimer Module is fully functional. Key test IDs: footer-legal-disclaimer, footer-terms-of-use, dashboard-legal-disclaimer, dashboard-terms-of-use, terms-checkbox, terms-link, legal-disclaimer-link, submit-registration-btn. Footer is implemented in ProtectedRoute component in App.js and appears on all authenticated pages.

feature_1.description: Footer appears globally on all protected pages

feature_2.description: Footer contains links to /legal-disclaimer and /terms-of-use that navigate correctly

feature_3.description: Dashboard has legal links section with Legal Disclaimer and Terms of Use links

feature_4.description: Legal Disclaimer page (/legal-disclaimer) renders correctly with proper content

feature_5.description: Terms of Use page (/terms-of-use) renders correctly with proper content

feature_6.description: Professional Registration page Step 3 has click-wrap agreement checkbox

feature_7.description: Click-wrap agreement checkbox must be checked before Create Profile button is enabled

feature_8.description: Click-wrap agreement contains links to /terms-of-use and /legal-disclaimer that open in new tabs
